seoTitle: Karte vs Keilira — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Karte and Keilira. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karte and Keilira.
heading: Karte vs Keilira — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karte, South Australia and Keilira, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keilira has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Karte (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karte or Keilira safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karte has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Keilira scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karte scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Keilira scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karte or Keilira?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keilira has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
